prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Run anomaly detection on transformer T-019 winding temperature for the past 7 days and summarize any persistent abnormal periods.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should identify abnormal intervals (if any), quantify severity or count of anomalies, and provide a concise interpretation of persistence.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — List all Smart Grid transformer assets with health status.
  Step 2: [tsfm] get_rul — Get the most recent remaining useful life (RUL) estimate for transformer T-019. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-019. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Get the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-019. (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalous sensor readings using a rolling z-score method for the past 7 days. (depends on steps [3])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "List all Smart Grid transformer assets with health status.",
    "server": "iot",
    "tool": "list_assets",
    "tool_args": {
      "health_status": "any"
    },

    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true,

  },

    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-001\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-001\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 2526,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-002\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-002\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Beta\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3317,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-003\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-003\",\n  \"location\": \"Industrial Park A\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3783,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-004\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-004\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 4316,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-005\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-005\",\n  \"location\": \"Substation Alpha\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3364,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-006\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-006\",\n  \"location\": \"Distribution Center 2\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3608,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-007\",\n  \"name\": \"Power Transformer T-007\",\n  \"location\": \"Industrial Park A\",\n  \"health_status\": 0,\n  \"rul_days\": 3860,\n  \"in_service\": true\n}\n{\n  \"transformer_id\"\n...[truncated 485 chars]",

  },
  {
    "step": 2,

    "server": "tsfm",

    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-019\",\n  \"as_of_date\": \"2024-01-31\",\n  \"rul_days\": 8,\n  \"health_index\": 0.0073,\n  \"fdd_category\": 4,\n  \"confidence\": 0.808,\n  \"interpretation\": \"Critical \\u2014 immediate inspection required.\"\n}",

    "executor_success": true,

...(truncated)

## Agent Final Answer
Based on the results, we were unable to complete the anomaly detection on the winding temperature of transformer T-019 for the past 7 days due to an error in the z-score threshold input. However, we can still provide some insights from the available data.

The most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-019 indicates a fault label of "Arc discharge" with a source dataset of "synthetic". The IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method classification also indicates a diagnosis of "Normal / Inconclusive" with specific gas ratios.

The recent RUL estimate for transformer T-019 indicates a remaining useful life of 8 days as of January 31, 2024, with a health index of 0.0073 and a confidence level of 0.808, suggesting a critical condition requiring immediate inspection.

Unfortunately, without the completed anomaly detection, we cannot provide a summary of persistent abnormal periods in the winding temperature of transformer T-019 for the past 7 days.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": true,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true,
    "hallucinations": false,
    "suggestions": "Check the input validation for detect_anomalies tool and provide a valid z_threshold value."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Check the input validation for detect_anomalies tool and provide a valid z_threshold value.
